.internal-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
